feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to disable the company SSO when logging client's BTP env?
entry.content:
Hi BTP experts,

We got the BTP development env URL and user credential from our client, however when try to open, our SAP laptop will always automatically use our company SSO, but since the user account is belonging to external IdP, hence it is always failed (refer to attachment). If I open it on my own PC or mobile browser, it is fine (will prompt user / password input window, see attachment).

May I know, can we disable such auto SSO for dedicated BTP URL of client env, so that it will prompt user / password window rather than using company SSO?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: SAP Ariba Integration with S/4HANA Public Cloud for Business Partner replication using SOAP API's
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we are integrated from Ariba to S/4 HANA Public Cloud using SOAP APIs using Managed Gateways Passthrough integration via BTP Master Data Integration.

  • We are created Instances services as Master Data Integration and Subscription services as Master Data Integration (Orchestration).
  • We have use this JSON below to create the service instance.

 

{
    "application": "s4",
    "businessSystemId": "<businessSystemId>", //Business System ID is SAP S/4HANA Cloud system this value is can be found under Communication systems tile and then filter by Own System.
    "enableTenantDeletion": false,
    "globalTenantId": "<subaccount Id under Service Key>",
    "logSys": "<Same logsys configure in S4PC>",
    "writePermissions": [
        {
            "entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartner"
        },
        {
            "entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartnerRelationship"
        }
    ],
    "xs-security": {
        "xsappname": "<a unique v4 UUID can be used>",
        "authorities": [
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.BPCommonRead",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.BPSensitiveDataRead"
        ]
    }
}

 

  • Created new project in managed gateway to connection from Managed Gateway to MDI (BTP). We are encountering a 404 error while testing the connection. 

    Configure in CIG inbound URL is https://<one-mds.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com>/businesspartner/v0/soap/BusinessPartnerBulkReplicateRequestIn?tenantId=<identityzone>

    For basic authentication, specify the following:
    User: Value of clientid from the Service key
    Password: Value of clientsecret from the Service key
  • While triggering business partner replication from S4PC its successfully reaching BTP but not in Ariba (Manage Gateway).
  • How to send master data from MDI to Ariba solution?
  • Can you please share configuration guide for this?

Could you please help me on this Integration connection.

Below are the links we referenced and created the MDI integration.

About Supplier Data Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Using SAP Master Data Integration | SAP Help Portal

Configuring SOAP Outbound Destinations to the SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network in SAP Master Data Integration | SAP Help Portal

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/configuring-sap-master-data-integration-service-for-business-partner/ba-p/13543017

Thanks & Regards,

Thouheed

entry.title: Groovy Script for removing reserved character inside XML node
entry.content:
Dear CPI experts. 

Good day, 

Looking to get assistance with my requirement below. 

The idea is to remove all below reserved characters from inside the all XML nodes if they are present.

However below script im trying to work with, but does not work. It is not preserving the XML structure hence the entire output is incorrect.

reserved characters *%?:;=()[]|#@

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil
import groovy.util.XmlSlurper

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def body = message.getBody(String) 

    def root = new XmlSlurper().parseText(body)

    def cleanNodeContent
    cleanNodeContent = { node ->
        if (node instanceof groovy.util.slurpersupport.NodeChild) {
            if (node.text()) {
                // Remove reserved characters: *%?:;=()[]|#@
                def cleanedText = node.text().replaceAll('[*%?:;=()\\[\\]\\|#@]', '')
                node.setValue(cleanedText)
            }
        }

        node.children().each { child ->
            cleanNodeContent(child)
        }
    }

    cleanNodeContent(root)

    def cleanedXml = XmlUtil.serialize(root)

    message.setBody(cleanedXml) // Set the modified body back to the message
    return message
}

 #

entry.title: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts

 

Any idea how to read incoming xml namespace using groovy script ?

Requirement is to validate namespace and if it does not match the correct version, fail the iflow.

I was also thinking abt XSLT but how do I then fail the iflow it version does not match?

<xsl:if test="//namespace::*[.!='http://testns/2.6']">

Thanks

entry.title: Error P014: Activation of Cloud Integration capability has failed.
entry.content:
Hello SAP.

I am taking the https://training.sap.com/certification/c_cpi_2404-sap-certified-associate---integration-developer-g/?.

Following this guide and things are working fine: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hcp-create-trial-account.html

Then I am trying to set up the Integration Suit Trial following this guide: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-starter-isuite-onboard-subscribe..html

In step four, I am trying to add the cloud integration capability and getting the error as seen in image 104056.

I also tried to access SAP Note 2904202: 

when redirected to 2904202, it is empty as in image 105038.

I have been unable to find anything with a similar errortype in the community.

I have tried to delete all subscriptions and then resubscribe them. I have also tried to removed all entitlements and give them again with any success.

As a last resort a tried deleting the entire trial and start a new and end up with the same error P014: Activation of cloud integration capability has failed.

entry.title: Error P014 when activating Cloud Integration in my account
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to activate Cloud Integration in the Integration Suite and error P014 is occurring as shown in the attached image
Could you help me?

Thanks.

entry.title: My Integration Suite was deleted automatically, now it is not showing under Subscriptions
Integration Suite Error - ScriptCollectionException - Reusable_Groovy_Scripts_V2 are not available
entry.content:
I am just getting started with SAP Integration Suite. Could someone explain what I am doing wrong that is causing the artifact to fail. See log below. I have deployed an artifact to retrieve a test PO file and pass file to Process Direct for further processing. See Print Screen below. I have deployed Resuable Groovy Script from Cloud Integration - Trading Partner Management V2.

 

 

Error Log

com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.processor.ScriptCollectionException: Service references of CompiledScriptProvider for referenced script collection Reusable_Groovy_Scripts_V2are not available

Message Processing Log:
  StartTime           = Wed Aug 28 15:53:00.174 UTC 2024
  StopTime            = Wed Aug 28 15:53:00.396 UTC 2024
  OverallStatus       = FAILED
  MessageGuid         = AGbPR9w1PVdmQbJ9ELrfoPyQXtlt
  LogLevel            = DEBUG
  LogLevelExternal    = NONE
  ArchivingLogAttachments= false
  ArchivingPersistedMessages= false
  ArchivingReceiverChannelMessages= false
  ArchivingSenderChannelMessages= false
  ChildCount          = 0
  ChildrenCounter     = 4
  ContextName         = HomeDepot_COMM_PROCESSDIRECT_SFTP_SENDER
  CorrelationId       = AGbPR9yP5kmAeNnJgnZ5eG-IaEoj
  IntermediateError   = true
  LastError           = com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.processor.ScriptCollectionException: Service references of CompiledScriptProvider for referenced script collection Reusable_Groovy_Scripts_V2are not available
  LastErrorModelStepId= MessageFlow_6
  Node                = 1
  OriginComponentName = CPI_dev-btp
  PreviousComponentName= CPI_dev-btp
  TransactionId       = 142aec28a65b4bdea83dddd5ab0ea019

Segment:
   Exchange ID-e5cc7579-bc3c-46e2-71dd-20d0-1724604007912-38-5 created in sap-sftp://secureftp.resolutefp.com:4022//?allowDeprecatedAlgorithms=false&authMethod=user&autoCreate=false&connectTimeout=10000&connectivityServiceProvider=%23connectivityServiceProvider&credential=Resolute_Prod_CrushFTP_DV&delete=false&disconnect=false&fastExistsCheck=true&filter=%23MessageFlow_5.filter&flatten=false&inProgressRepository=%23MessageFlow_5.inProgressRepo&keyStoreAccess=%23keyStoreAccess&knownHostsAccess=%23knownHostsAccess&maxMessagesPerPoll=20&maximumReconnectAttempts=3&noop=false&passwordStorage=xxxxxx&pollStrategy=%23pollStrategy&proxyType=internet&readLock=none&reconnectDelay=1000&recursive=false&scheduler=MessageFlow_5.pollConsumerScheduler&scheduler.cron=0+0%2F1+0-23+%3F+*+*+*&scheduler.timeZone=Etc%2FGMT&soTimeout=300000&startingDirectoryMustExist=true&stepwise=false&streamDownload=true&throwExceptionOnConnectFailed=true:
     StartTime           = Wed Aug 28 15:53:00.175 UTC 2024
     StopTime            = Wed Aug 28 15:53:00.354 UTC 2024
     Status              = PROCESSING
     ChildCount          = 1
     File                = EDI850_HomeDepotTissue_STEP1_X12original_source.edi
     ModelStepId         = MessageFlow_5
     Activities [
      {Activity=Exchange ID-e5cc7579-bc3c-46e2-71dd-20d0-1724604007912-38-5 created in sap-sftp://secureftp.resolutefp.com:4022//?allowDeprecatedAlgorithms=false&authMethod=user&autoCreate=false&connectTimeout=10000&connectivityServiceProvider=%23connectivityServiceProvider&credential=Resolute_Prod_CrushFTP_DV&delete=false&disconnect=false&fastExistsCheck=true&filter=%23MessageFlow_5.filter&flatten=false&inProgressRepository=%23MessageFlow_5.inProgressRepo&keyStoreAccess=%23keyStoreAccess&knownHostsAccess=%23knownHostsAccess&maxMessagesPerPoll=20&maximumReconnectAttempts=3&noop=false&passwordStorage=xxxxxx&pollStrategy=%23pollStrategy&proxyType=internet&readLock=none&reconnectDelay=1000&recursive=false&scheduler=MessageFlow_5.pollConsumerScheduler&scheduler.cron=0+0%2F1+0-23+%3F+*+*+*&scheduler.timeZone=Etc%2FGMT&soTimeout=300000&startingDirectoryMustExist=true&stepwise=false&streamDownload=true&throwExceptionOnConnectFailed=true, StartTime=Wed Aug 28 15:53:00.175 UTC 2024}
      {Activity=removeHeaders[*], StartTime=Wed Aug 28 15:53:00.354 UTC 2024, StopTime=Wed Aug 28 15:53:00.354 UTC 2024}
     ]

     ]

   Processing exchange ID-e5cc7579-bc3c-46e2-71dd-20d0-1724604007912-38-5:

     ]

     ModelStepId         = MessageFlow_6

     Activities [
      {Activity=sap-processdirect:foo?address=/tpm/b2b/processdirect, StartTime=Wed Aug 28 15:53:00.355 UTC 2024, StopTime=Wed Aug 28 15:53:00.386 UTC 2024}
      {Activity=Exchange ID-e5cc7579-bc3c-46e2-71dd-20d0-1724604007912-38-5 failed, StartTime=Wed Aug 28 15:53:00.394 UTC 2024}
     ]

entry.title: Error oData Iflow in CPI - java.util.ArrayList cannot be cast to java.util.HashMap
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have an iflow with oData service in CPI, and when consume with Postman, I have the following error when the response returns multilple records:

java.lang.ClassCastException: java.util.ArrayList (loaded by <bootstrap>) cannot be cast to java.util.HashMap (loaded by <bootstrap>)

Any suggest what may be happening?

Attached EDMX model and xml response.

Thanks.

entry.title: Cloud Integration - Advanced Event Mesh Adapter Issue
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to use the "Advanced Event Mesh" Adapter from Cloud Integration. However, when I publish a message to a topic, I encounter the following error:

  • org.apache.camel.RuntimeCamelException: A reply was not received within the allotted time [1000 ms]


The message is correctly published in the AEM, I can see it in the subscribed queue, but the adapter still throws the error, even when publication went fine.

This is my configuration:

Could you please assist with this issue? I'd like to use this adapter, but the iFlow encounters an error even when the publishing seems to work fine.

P.S.: This very same iFlow works completely fine with the "AMQP" Receiver adapter, but I'd like to take advantage of the dedicated adapter's enhanced functionality.

Thank you!

entry.title: The order of payload when using Odata adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm encountering an unusual issue with OData queries in SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI), and I'm hoping someone can shed some light on this problem.

The Issue

When I perform an OData GET query, the order of the data fields in the result is reversed when using SAP CPI compared to when I use Postman.

Postman Result (Correct Order):

Product, ProductType, LastChangeDate

SAP CPI Result (Reversed Order):

LastChangeDate, ProductType, Product

I've attempted to resolve this by adding the $orderby parameter to my query, but unfortunately, this did not solve the issue. ($orderby=Product,ProductType,LastChangeDate)

 

My Questions are

1. Why might this reversal of field order occur when using SAP CPI?
2. How can I ensure that the field order in SAP CPI matches what I see in Postman?

As your reference, the attached screenshots show the Integration flow as well as the connection configuration for Odata Adapter, as well as the payload with reversed order.

 

It would be a huge help if you could please kindly advise on this one!

Thank you.

entry.title: Detailed demo of utilising TPM, Integration Advisor for an E-2-E B2B Implementation
entry.content:
I have a B2B scenario where I want a partner which is using custom XML, let's say UBL21 Sales order, uses a third-party VAN which sends the data via as2 protocol.
Once received in CPI, post message mappings and transformations, it gets inserted into SAP as an idoc ZORDERS1.

Now to fulfill this requirement, I can use web methods solution. I am expecting some tutorial using SAP CPI and its features called trading partner management, integration advisor.

Do you have any course walkthrough or case studies with clear detailed steps to achieve this end to end?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Unable to query/filter LastChangeDateTime in S/4 !
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to perform a GET call through HTTP adapter or POSTMAN based on LastChangeDateTime value and the query is as below but getting 400 error. with out the below query parameter I am able to fetch records even select fields

https://<host>/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrder?$filter=LastChangeDateTime ge datetimeoffset'2024-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z'

And the records look like below

Please suggest what could be the issue here

entry.title: API Error G/L Accounting Document
entry.content:
I want to create a G/L Accounting Document, there is an error that I have created based on this case in the API but cannot resolve.

Please help me.

 

【Error Detail】

<Item>
 <TypeID>113(FINS_ACDOC_POST)</TypeID>
 <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
 <Note>An entry is required in House bank field for account 11001020</Note>
 </Item>


【Body】
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN">
   <soapenv:Header/>
   <soapenv:Body>
      <sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>
         <MessageHeader>
            <ID>MSG_2018-10-31</ID>
            <!--<ReferenceID></ReferenceID>-->
            <CreationDateTime>2024-08-13T12:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
         </MessageHeader>
         <!--1 or more repetitions:-->
         <JournalEntryCreateRequest>
            <MessageHeader>
               <ID>SUB_MSG_2018-10-31</ID>
               <!--<ReferenceID></ReferenceID>-->
               <CreationDateTime>2024-08-13T12:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
            </MessageHeader>
            <JournalEntry>
               <OriginalReferenceDocumentType>BKPFF</OriginalReferenceDocumentType>
               <BusinessTransactionType>RFBU</BusinessTransactionType>
               <AccountingDocumentType>SA</AccountingDocumentType>
               <DocumentReferenceID>123</DocumentReferenceID>
               <DocumentHeaderText>Test JE Posting</DocumentHeaderText>
               <CreatedByUser>CB9980000014</CreatedByUser>
               <CompanyCode>1510</CompanyCode>
               <DocumentDate>2024-08-13</DocumentDate>
               <PostingDate>2024-08-13</PostingDate>
               <Reference1InDocumentHeader>12345678901234567890</Reference1InDocumentHeader>
               <Reference2InDocumentHeader>1234567890</Reference2InDocumentHeader>
               <Item>
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>1</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <GLAccount>10010000</GLAccount>
                  <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="JPY">1000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                  <DebitCreditCode>S</DebitCreditCode>
                  <DocumentItemText>Test Item 1</DocumentItemText>
                  <AccountAssignment>
                     <CostCenter>15101101</CostCenter>
                  </AccountAssignment>
               </Item>
               <Item>
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>2</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <GLAccount>11001020</GLAccount>
                  <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="JPY">-1000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                  <DebitCreditCode>H</DebitCreditCode>
                  <DocumentItemText>Test Item 2</DocumentItemText>
                  <AccountAssignment>
                     <CostCenter>15101101</CostCenter>
                  </AccountAssignment>
               </Item>
            </JournalEntry>
         </JournalEntryCreateRequest>
      </sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>
   </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

entry.title: How to access Message processing logs in cpi using groovy script?
entry.content:
I want to access the MPL logs(specifically status) in CPI to log the message only if it is error status.

One way i could think of is to use the standard OData API. But is there a way where I could access the message status using groovy like other partner directory API's

Ref:

https://api.sap.com/api/MessageProcessingLogs/overview

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/read-and-modify-partner-directory-content

entry.title: Converting file from CRLF to LF in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
hi all,

We have a scenario where a .txt file (with multiple records)has to be placed in AL11 path of SAP for further processing. We noticed if we place Windows CRLF file then it produces a # at the end, for each record -when processing at SAP.

When changing the file manually to Unix LF, using notepad++ and placing it in AL11 , the processing happens smoothly. 

Can anyone suggest how we can achieve the LF file from CRLF using SAP Integration Suite??

Regards,

Smitha

entry.title: Extract attributes from XML
entry.content:
I want to extract 2-attributes from XML. The names of attribute for extraction from this xml is -

ERPNumber, 

ProcurementUnit/UniqueName

UniqueName

 

My XML structures look like this -

<SimplifiedRequest>
<CancelExportRequest>
<OrdHeader_Item>
<item>
<ERPNumber>Y465643</ERPNumber>
<ProcurementUnit>
<UniqueName>6604</UniqueName>
</ProcurementUnit>
<UniqueName>EPT10053-V3</UniqueName>
<VersionNumber>3</VersionNumber>
<custom>
<CustomBoolean name="SuppressOrder">false</CustomBoolean>
<CustomString name="Test"/>
<CustomString name="SupplierID">AEQ600:0000399413</CustomString>
</custom>
</item>
</OrdHeader_Item>
</CancelExportRequest>
</SimplifiedRequest>

Can you help me here?

entry.title: Facing 401 unauthorized error while trying post data to CPI via SAP API Management
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send request to SAP CPI via API Management.

But I am facing "401 Unauthorized" error while connecting to CPI though I have maintained correct credential in KeyValue Map. (CSRF token is unchecked in CPI HTTP adapter)

Using same credentials I am able to call CPI endpoint directly from Postman send data successfully.

I tried to test from both API Management and Postman(by calling API endpoint) but no luck. Also tried removing all the other policies.

Can someone help me understand if we have to do any kind of whitelisting or additional roles to be added to call CPI from APIM?

Below is the screen from APIM Debug :

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Madhura

entry.title: Override positionCriticality field in SuccessFactors using an integration (BTP) from HCM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we are using the field positionCriticality in SuccessFactors Succession. This field is a position data which will update by the standard integration via BTP from HCM. Unfortunately the field gets override every day. Is there a possibility to adjust the integration that the content of the field will not override in SuccessFactors. Is it true, that there is only the following solution possible: 

Create a customer-specific field in SAP HCM, have it maintained there and include it in the “delta migration” of the OM objects

Does anybody see an alternative for this issue?

Thanks a lot for supporting! BR, Sandra

entry.title: No logs for successful messages in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

In the message monitoring logs are not available for successful messages. We can only see that messages is successful.

For the errors we have logs, but for successful messages we don't have.

As the Retention period is 30 days, we can only see successful and failed messages. 

For eg. I would like to know File Transmission Logs.

File is picked from S4 AL11 - Archive - Target (These steps we can't see in case of INFO level and we can't change it to TRACE everytime).

Can anyone please help?
